Title: Establishes the research literacy enhancement program and fund
Summary: Establishes the research literacy enhancement program to make grants to academic institutions within the state which seek to conduct research on literacy; creates the research literacy enhancement fund.
LawCode: Add Title 6 Art 107 §§5300 - 5303, Ed L; add §95-l, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to creating the research literacy enhancement program; and to amend the state finance law, in relation to creating the research literacy enhancement fund
